creator: kristinacors
caption: You have to try THIS wine bar for date night in East Village #travelbucketlist #nychiddengems #bestwinebar #bestrestaurantnyc #datenightnyc @ruffian_nyc

transcription.text: If you like moody, candle-lit wine bars with good quality wine and incredible food, you will love this spot in the East Village of Manhattan. This place was special. I was truly blown away by the quality of the food and wine. It's actually been recognized by the Michelin Guide with a Bib Gourmand, which basically means amazing food without insane prices. And the second the food came out, I understood why. Every single bite was perfectly cooked, perfectly seasoned, and packed with flavor. I'm not even kidding. I could have ordered two of everything. Here's what we got. And oh my god, this pork was slow-cooked for six hours and literally just fell apart. It was so tender and so flavorful. And then everything is designed to pair with their wines, which makes the whole experience feel really elevated. But what actually shocked me are the prices. This is definitely the best meal I've had for the price in New York City this year. The name of this spot is Ruffians. It's in the East Village, and you're definitely going to want to come here for date night. So share this with someone you want to go with, and follow for more hidden gems in New York City and around the world.
